inputs.label: Diagonal 1 (d1)
inputs.businessContext: Length of the first diagonal of the rhombus

inputs.label: Diagonal 2 (d2)
inputs.businessContext: Length of the second diagonal of the rhombus

inputs.label: Side Length (a)
inputs.businessContext: Length of one side of the rhombus

inputs.label: Angle (θ)
inputs.businessContext: Angle between two adjacent sides (in degrees)

formulas.area: ((diagonal1 && diagonal2) ? (diagonal1 * diagonal2 / 2) : (sideLength && height) ? (sideLength * height) : (sideLength && angle) ? (sideLength ** 2 * Math.sin(angle * Math.PI / 180)) : 0)
